sentence: 老师傅还在用传统方法打铁。
pinyin: Lǎo shīfu hái zài yòng chuántǒng fāngfǎ dǎtiě.
english: The old craftsman still forges ironware using traditional methods.

sentence: 他被封为大将军，统领全军。
pinyin: Tā bèi fēng wéi dàjiāngjūn, tǒnglǐng quánjūn.
english: He was appointed generalissimo and commanded the entire army.

sentence: 这件事先别声张，等确认再说。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì xiān bié shēngzhāng, děng quèrèn zài shuō.
english: Don't make this public yet — wait until it's confirmed.

sentence: 这个月的销售定额已经完成了。
pinyin: Zhège yuè de xiāoshòu dìng'é yǐjīng wánchéng le.
english: This month's sales quota has already been met.

sentence: 今天的风速很快，出门要注意。
pinyin: Jīntiān de fēngsù hěn kuài, chūmén yào zhùyì.
english: The wind speed is very high today; be careful when you go out.
